description_long: This is a plush, upholstered chaise with a distinctive and bold printed design that mimics the appearance of a human torso and lower body in black swimwear. The chaise features a deep, button-tufted backrest and armrests that curve outward, creating a classic Chesterfield silhouette. The upholstery is primarily a pale, flesh-toned color with black accents, and the print wraps continuously around the seat, back, and arms. The legs are short, turned, and appear to be made of wood with a dark finish, each fitted with small casters for mobility. The seat is wide and deep, offering ample space for lounging, and the overall construction suggests a soft, cushioned interior. Decorative nailhead trim runs along the front of the arms, adding a touch of traditional elegance to the otherwise provocative design.
description: A plush, button-tufted chaise with a bold, human-body print in pale and black tones, featuring curved arms, deep cushioning, and short wooden legs with casters.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep, button-tufted backrest and arms, with the striking torso print and nailhead trim along the arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, rounded armrest and the continuation of the print along the side, with visible tufting.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the chaise with the lower body print, the full width of the backrest, and both armrests curving outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rounded armrest, tufting, and the print wrapping around the side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, deeply button-tufted, and curves smoothly into the armrests, creating a continuous, enveloping form. It features a classic Chesterfield style with visible tufting and a plush, padded appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, thick, rounded, and integrated into the backrest with matching tufting.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, turned wood with a dark finish and are fitted with small metal casters for mobility. They are simple and functional, with minimal decorative detail.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a highly distinctive printed pattern resembling a human torso and lower body in black swimwear, combined with deep button tufting for a quilted effect.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The chaise has a single, large, attached seat cushion integrated into the frame, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The back and arms are padded and tufted, providing additional comfort.
